'''Gad "Slug" Sluggins''' was a member of the [[Peace Brigade]] who in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] tried to capture [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] only to be shot between the shoulder blades with a stun bolt by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. His leader [[Roxi Barl]] was killed.

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Recovery]]'' {{1st}}
